de.title: Data Engineer
de.tagline: Building scalable data pipelines, orchestration systems & cloud native data solutions
de.summary: Results driven Data Engineer with hands on experience across the full data engineering lifecycle designing and deploying scalable ETL/ELT pipelines, automated orchestration frameworks, real time SLA monitoring systems, and cloud data lakehouses. Proficient in Databricks, PySpark, Apache Airflow, Spark SQL, and Azure/AWS. Proven ability to deliver production grade, cost optimized, and fully automated data solutions for enterprise clients including Amgen. Holds three Databricks certifications covering Data Engineering and Generative AI.

swe.title: Software Engineer / Full Stack Developer
swe.tagline: Delivering robust full stack applications, REST APIs & intelligent web based tools
swe.summary: Versatile Software Engineer with production experience building secure, full stack web applications, REST APIs, and data intensive backend systems for enterprise clients. Proficient in Python, FastAPI, Streamlit, and MySQL. Skilled in role based authentication, automated workflows, SMTP notification systems, and GitLab CI/CD pipelines. Consistently delivers clean, modular, well documented code that is scalable, maintainable, and ready for production deployment.

ds.title: Data Scientist / ML Engineer
ds.tagline: Transforming complex datasets into predictive models, actionable insights & interactive dashboards
ds.summary: Analytical Data Scientist and ML Engineer with hands on experience developing predictive models, performing end-to-end exploratory data analysis, and building interactive dashboards for enterprise clients. Proficient in XGBoost, Random Forest, Scikit-learn, Feature Engineering, and Power BI. Experienced with star schema data modelling, ETL orchestration on Databricks, and delivering ML powered web applications via Streamlit. Committed to translating raw data into measurable business outcomes.

ai.title: AI / LLM Engineer
ai.tagline: Designing production grade AI agents, RAG pipelines & generative AI applications
ai.summary: Innovative AI/LLM Engineer with proven production experience delivering conversational AI systems, retrieval augmented generation (RAG) pipelines, agentic AI workflows, and generative AI applications for Amgen. Proficient in OpenAI, Google Gemini, Phi-3-mini SLM, Groq, CrewAI, AutoGen, LangGraph, LangChain, ChromaDB, and pgvector. Holds three Databricks certifications in Generative AI and Data Engineering. Passionate about building intelligent, low latency AI solutions that solve real world enterprise problems.

bullets_de: Designed and implemented fully automated job orchestration and pipeline triggering for the OCX AI Master Build (Amgen), eliminating dependency on paid orchestration tools and enabling zero code onboarding of new business units and brands.
Developed dynamic incremental load frameworks on Databricks to process only delta data instead of full historical loads, drastically reducing compute usage and pipeline execution time.

Built end-to-end health check data pipelines categorizing runs as On Time, Delayed, or Missed SLA, with automated SMTP email alerts to clients and operations teams, ensuring proactive incident response.
Engineered brand specific Airflow DAG scheduling with configurable date time windows, ensuring correct brands are processed on scheduled days with full flexibility for future onboarding.
Optimized Databricks workloads through compute refactoring and Spark SQL tuning for the QuerySense project (Amgen), achieving significant cluster cost reduction and improved execution efficiency.
Implemented idempotency logic to prevent duplicate email notifications and duplicate data logging across business unit delta tables, ensuring pipeline reliability.
Performed end-to-end data validation using business rules and validation logic, ensuring pipeline outputs met stakeholder requirements across multiple enterprise engagements.
Maintained Confluence technical documentation covering architecture, workflows, and operational guidelines, and conducted knowledge transfer sessions for smooth project handovers.
bullets_swe: Designed and developed the CTDA Clinical Trial Operations Assistant (Amgen) using FastAPI with modular Python architecture, supporting both text based and voice to text interactions with role based access control.

Built the SOW Generator full stack application using Python, Google Gemini, and Streamlit, enabling automated Statement of Work creation from LLM prompt templates — significantly reducing manual documentation time for the RMG team.
Engineered the OCX AI Master Build (Amgen) automation framework using custom Python orchestration code, replacing paid tools with a scalable, dynamic, fully maintainable solution.
Developed secure role based authentication, session state management, and real time feedback interfaces across multiple Streamlit based enterprise web applications.
Built automated SMTP email notification systems with RAG status tagging, stakeholder specific routing, and date range reporting filters across multiple internal tools.
Implemented GitLab CI/CD workflows for version controlled automated deployment of data engineering pipelines, reducing release cycle time and improving deployment consistency.
Containerized the CTDA chatbot application using Docker for portable, seamless deployment across web and mobile platforms.
Consistently delivered clean, modular, well-documented code with end-to-end testing, debugging, and error tracking across all projects.
bullets_ds: Designed and implemented a robust star schema data model with structured fact and dimension tables for the ANVISA pharmaceutical sales analysis project, enabling scalable analytical reporting.

Trained and fine tuned XGBoost and Random Forest predictive models to forecast pharmaceutical sales trends using Databricks, PySpark, and SparkSQL, achieving high accuracy outputs validated by stakeholders.
Built dynamic Power BI dashboards visualizing pharmaceutical sales trends, prescriber behaviour, and regional performance, enabling data driven decisions for business stakeholders.
Developed a Streamlit-based interactive web application for real time pharmaceutical sales predictions, bridging the gap between ML models and end user accessibility.
Orchestrated scalable ETL workflows for data ingestion, transformation, and loading with comprehensive data cleansing, validation, and quality checks to ensure accuracy.
Applied exploratory data analysis (EDA) to identify key entities, metrics, and relationships within complex pharmaceutical datasets.
Leveraged MLflow for model tracking, parameter logging, and experiment management across ML projects.
Delivered actionable insights by collaborating closely with stakeholders to validate model outputs and align analytical findings with business objectives.
bullets_ai: Designed and implemented the CTDA Clinical Trial Operations Assistant (Amgen) - a production grade RAG chatbot using Phi-3-mini SLM, Groq API, ChromaDB, and pgvector for efficient vector search and precise domain specific responses sourced from ClinicalTrials.gov.
Developed and orchestrated AI agent workflows for QuerySense (Amgen) using AutoGen, CrewAI, LangGraph, and LangChain to enable automated, context aware SQL query refinement driven by Generative AI.
Integrated OpenAI GPT with Python and FastAPI for QuerySense to streamline complex SQL query enhancement processes with clean architecture and external configuration handling.

Built the SOW Generator using Google Gemini and advanced prompt engineering strategies, delivering accurate, contextually relevant, and professionally structured documents from natural language inputs.
Applied prompt engineering best practices across multiple production GenAI applications including BRD Generator, Source Code Generator, Test Case Generator, and SOW Generator.
Containerized the CTDA chatbot using Docker for scalable, cross-platform deployment supporting both web and mobile environments.
Integrated secure API key management, environment variable configuration, and session state handling across all GenAI applications to ensure security and maintainability.
Held three Databricks certifications: Certified Data Engineer Associate, Certified Generative AI Engineer Associate, and Accredited Generative AI Fundamentals.

projects.name: OCX AI Master Build - Q3
projects.description: Fully automated, scalable data pipeline orchestration system built on Databricks for Amgen, eliminating dependency on paid orchestration tools and enabling zero code onboarding of new business units and brands.
highlights: Designed fully automated job orchestration, pipeline triggering, and dynamic scheduling using custom code no paid orchestration tools required
Built dynamic incremental load frameworks processing only delta data, drastically reducing compute usage and execution time
Implemented weekday based brand execution logic ensuring only relevant brands are processed on scheduled days
Developed a robust notification framework with automated email alerts to clients and operations teams based on delta data
Enforced idempotency logic to prevent duplicate notifications and duplicate data logging across business unit tables
Performed end-to-end data validation with defined business rules; prepared Confluence documentation and conducted knowledge transfer sessions

projects.name: QuerySense - AI-Powered SQL Optimizer
projects.description: Generative AI system that optimizes complex SQL queries using OpenAI GPT, FastAPI, and multi-agent orchestration frameworks, deployed on Databricks with Apache Spark performance tuning.
highlights: Designed and implemented prompt engineering strategy to optimize SQL queries using Generative AI (OpenAI GPT)
Integrated OpenAI with Python and FastAPI for scalable, maintainable query enhancement with external configuration handling
Developed and orchestrated AI agent workflows using AutoGen, CrewAI, LangGraph, and LangChain for automated query refinement
Conducted rigorous Spark SQL performance testing on Databricks, applying Apache Spark optimization techniques to identify and resolve bottlenecks
Collaborated with a cross-functional team using an iterative approach to test, validate, and improve accuracy of AI optimized SQL outputs

projects.name: CTDA - Clinical Trial Operations Assistant
projects.description: Production grade RAG based chatbot for resolving clinical trial domain queries, built with Phi-3-mini SLM, ChromaDB, pgvector, FastAPI, and Docker supporting voice-to-text interactions and deployed across web and mobile platforms.
highlights: Implemented backend using FastAPI with Groq API integration following modular Python architecture for scalability
Leveraged Phi-3-mini SLM with RAG, integrating ChromaDB and pgvector for efficient vector search over ClinicalTrials.gov datasets
Designed secure, role based UI with tab based navigation, visibility controls, and voice-to-text interaction support
Containerized the full application using Docker for portable deployment across web and mobile platforms
Conducted rigorous testing, debugging, and performance optimization for low-latency, reliable responses

projects.name: SOW Generator - GenAI Document Automation
projects.description: Generative AI powered full stack application that automates Statement of Work creation for multiple client accounts using Google Gemini, Streamlit, and advanced prompt engineering.
highlights: Leveraged Google Gemini with advanced prompt engineering to generate accurate, context specific SOW documents from predefined LLM templates
Built intuitive Streamlit interface with session state management for persistent content display and seamless user experience
Implemented secure environment variable management via dotenv for API keys and model parameters
Delivered end-to-end workflow from data input to final document output, significantly reducing manual effort and turnaround time for the RMG team
Applied clean modular architecture ensuring scalability and maintainability for future account additions

education.degree: B.Tech - Electronics and Computer Specialization Engineering
education.institution: SRM Institute of Science and Technology (SRMIST)

certifications.name: Databricks Certified Generative AI Engineer Associate
